subject: Export feature timing out on large projects

thread.body: Hi team — the PDF export has been timing out on our larger projects (200+ pages) for the past few days. Smaller exports work fine. We have a client deliverable Friday and really need this working. Anything known on your end?

subject: SSO not working for new team members

thread.body: We added 4 new team members to our Okta group this morning but they're getting 'Access Denied' when they try to log in through SSO. I've double-checked the Okta assignment on our side. Our existing users are fine. This is blocking our rollout — please advise ASAP.
[automated] Ticket tagged: SSO, enterprise. CSM Jordan Reese notified.

subject: How do I change my billing email?

thread.body: Hi, I signed up with my personal email but want invoices to go to our accounting address instead. How do I change that? Thanks!

I see two charges on my card for this month — one on March 1 for $149 and another on March 4 for $149. What's going on? I'm already not happy about the recent price increase and now this. Please refund the duplicate immediately.
What's the rate limit on the /projects endpoint? Getting sporadic 429s.

Hi Alex — Pro plan gets 100 req/min per endpoint. If you're bursting above that, you might want to add a retry with backoff on your side, or we can talk about the Enterprise tier which lifts that to 1000/min. Let me know if you'd like to discuss!
